notes: V2-P3-A: Added url fields to all 12 courses and platformContext to getCourseInventory response. V2-P3-B: Expanded getEdLightInitiatives with grounded descriptions, focus fields, and highlights arrays for all 4 platforms — especially News (community news/announcements) and Initiative (leadership programs/community organization). V2-P3-C: Updated both system prompt builders with explicit platform differentiation — Academy vs Code for courses, News for announcements, Initiative for leadership/community programs — plus platform-specific routing examples for all 4 benchmark prompts. V2-P3-D: Added 25 benchmark tests in grounded-knowledge.test.ts validating grounded data quality, platform differentiation, and system prompt routing for all 4 phase benchmark scenarios (What is EdLight, Academy courses, Code courses, What does Initiative do).
